examples: Fear arises out of this inner insufficiency, poverty and emptiness.
Mediocre personnel - technical or process insufficiency causes delays at multiple levels.
The shortage in net weight of delivered cargo was due to insufficiency of originally dispatched weight.
Ernesto Villegas said the president was following a strict treatment regimen for "respiratory insufficiency" caused by the infection.
For advocates, the near doubling of enforcement officers suggests the administration is finally acknowledging the insufficiency of patrol levels.
